name: PULTEGROUP INC/MI/
business: PulteGroup is a homebuilder that constructs and sells single-family homes. It also provides mortgage financing, title services, and insurance agency commissions through its Financial Services segment. Customers are homebuyers in 47 markets across 26 states.

exposures.sentence: Homebuilding offers a broad product line to meet the needs of homebuyers in our targeted markets.
Information technology failures or data security breaches could harm our business and result in substantial costs.
Our development, integration, and use of artificial intelligence ( AI ) technology in our operations remains in the early phases.

catalysts.event: Repay or refinance Pulte Mortgage's master repurchase agreement
catalysts.sentence: In August 2026, we need to repay or refinance Pulte Mortgage's master repurchase agreement with third-party lenders
our unsecured senior notes, the next tranche of which becomes due in March 2026
an 18% increase in our dividends from $0.22 to $0.26 per share effective with our January 2026 dividend payment
approving an additional $1.5 billion share repurchase authorization effective January 2025
